verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Heard all about it, no way we could doubt it, The marvelous things He has been; The Christ in the pages has lived through the ages, And made Himself real to men;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've been desiring the Word that's inspiring, Raising Him from history; This is my prayer, Lord Jesus, Be real to me.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: The prophets, the law, the theme of it all, It seems You were in everything; The message of Noah, the power of Elijah, The song that made David to sing;

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Then in Your plan, You came in a Man, A God we could touch and could see; Showing so clear Your desire to be real to me.
